channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Analysis of Potential Challenges Facing Prime Minister Mark Carney
item.description: Prime Minister Mark Carney, approaching the one-year mark in office, is currently enjoying strong polling support with the Liberals at 49 per cent nationwide, while the Conservatives sit at 35 per cen...

item.title: Michael Milton's family set to fly to Italy after delays in Doha due to Middle East conflict
item.description: Michael Milton, Australia's most decorated Winter Paralympian, is preparing to compete in his sixth Paralympics at Milano-Cortina after recovering from a broken leg. Meanwhile, his wife Penni and teen...

item.title: Rivers Chess Team Shines with Youngest Competitors and Secures Seven Medals at 2nd Niger Delta Games
item.description: The Rivers State chess team made a remarkable showing at the just-concluded second edition of the Niger Delta Games (NDG) held in Benin, Edo State, even though the overall Team Rivers underperformed. ...

item.title: Government Launches New Borehole to Improve Water Supply in Bronkhorstspruit
item.description: The Department of Water and Sanitation in South Africa has taken a significant step in addressing water challenges in Bronkhorstspruit, Tshwane, with the handover of a newly completed borehole. Minist...

item.title: Tanzania hosts EAC summit to strengthen regional integration and address funding gaps
item.description: On Saturday, March 7, 2026, leaders of the East African Community (EAC) met in Arusha for the 25th Ordinary Summit. This meeting comes at a time when the EAC faces financial pressures and debates over...

item.title: FAAN Lists Locations to Collect Go-Cashless Cards Ahead of Airport Cashless Policy Start
item.description: The Federal Airports Authority of Nigeria (FAAN) has released details on where to pick up Go-Cashless cards as Nigeria's airports shift to a fully cashless payment system starting March 1, 2026. This ...

item.title: Iranian president rejects US demands but apologises for regional attacks
item.description: Iran's president, Masoud Pezeshkian, has publicly rejected the United States' demand for unconditional surrender, describing it as a 'dream they should take to their grave'. In a pre-recorded address ...

item.title: Former Kiambu Governor Waititu Released on Bail Pending Appeal in Sh588 Million Corruption Case
item.description: Former Kiambu Governor Ferdinand Waititu is now out of custody following a review of his bail conditions in a high-profile corruption case involving Sh588 million. The High Court's Anti-Corruption and...

item.title: Four Dead and Multiple Injuries Reported After Tornadoes Strike Southern Michigan
item.description: Severe storms and at least one confirmed tornado caused widespread devastation in southern Michigan on Friday, March 6, 2026, resulting in four fatalities and numerous injuries. The National Weather S...

item.title: Larry Madowo Demonstrates How Meta Ray-Ban Glasses Record, Sparking Privacy Concerns in Kenya
item.description: CNN International journalist Larry Madowo has recently tested the new Meta Ray-Ban smart glasses, sparking a wider debate about privacy risks in Kenya. The glasses have built-in cameras that allow use...

item.title: US and Israel Conduct Strikes in Iran as Middle East Conflict Escalates
item.description: The conflict between the United States, Israel, and Iran has entered its eighth day, with escalating military actions across the Middle East. Israel launched a broad-scale wave of strikes on Tehran, i...

item.title: Australian access restricted on major porn sites ahead of mandatory age verification
item.description: Starting next week, Australian law will require porn websites to verify that users are over 18, introducing 'appropriate age assurance measures'. In response, several major free video platforms owned ...

item.title: Parliament pushes for stronger laws to increase women in leadership
item.description: Dar es Salaam: Speaker of the National Assembly, Mussa Azzan Zungu, emphasized Parliament’s strong commitment to laws that protect women’s rights and increase their participation in national developme...

item.title: Kenyan Artist Bahati Uses Boda Boda to Get Home After Floods Force Him to Leave SUV at Police Station
item.description: On Friday, March 6, heavy rains hit Nairobi, causing severe flooding in several areas. The floods were so intense that multiple people lost their lives, including eight reported by Nairobi Police Comm...

item.title: Liverpool secure FA Cup quarterfinal spot with 3-1 victory at Wolves
item.description: Liverpool bounced back from their narrow 2-1 Premier League defeat to Wolverhampton Wanderers earlier in the week to secure a 3-1 win in the FA Cup fifth round at Molineux Stadium. The Reds struggled ...

item.title: X Tests Contextual Ad Format Placing Product Recommendations Under Relevant User Posts
item.description: X, the social media platform formerly known as Twitter, is currently testing a novel advertising approach that places product recommendations directly beneath user posts mentioning a company or its of...

item.title: James Silk Buckingham: Journalist, Reformer, and Advocate for Press Freedom in Colonial India
item.description: In 1818, James Silk Buckingham arrived in Calcutta and soon faced a moral crisis when asked to transport enslaved people to Zanzibar. Standing firmly against slavery, he refused, which left him strand...

item.title: Iran Says It Will Not Target Neighbouring Countries Unless Attacked by US
item.description: Since the war started between the US, Israel, and Iran, Iran don dey fire missiles at Israeli and American targets for the Middle East. President Masoud Pezeshkian yan say Iran no go dey target any ne...

item.title: Abandoned townhouse in Barrie catches fire late at night
item.description: A fire broke out late last night at an abandoned townhouse in Barrie, Ontario. Emergency services responded quickly to the scene, ensuring that the fire did not spread to neighbouring properties. Fire...

item.title: New Zealand’s Remarkable Journey to the T20 World Cup Final
item.description: The article reflects on New Zealand’s unexpected journey to the T20 World Cup final, portraying it less as a sporting achievement and more as a reflection of a distinctive mindset. The author draws pa...
